calendarFaqs.q: Does Dallas Independent School District have a fall break in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Dallas Independent School District has a fall break running from Oct 8, 2026 to Oct 9, 2026, a total of 2 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Dallas Independent School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Dallas Independent School District is Tuesday, August 11, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Dallas Independent School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Dallas Independent School District runs Mar 15, 2027–Mar 19, 2027, 5 days.

yearNumbers.label: Starts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: First day moves from Aug 12 to Aug 11 vs 2025–2026.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break
yearNumbers.detail: Oct 8–9 two-day fall break continues as a Dallas ISD-specific feature, shifting one day earlier than last year.

calendarNotes: Dallas ISD begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 11, 2026. Spring Break runs March 15–19, 2027. The school year ends May 26, 2027.
